demos.reasoning: The image description contains a list of blood test results. The values for WBC, RBC, HGB, PLT, CRP, and hs-CRP are clearly provided. The CRP value is reported as "<10", which I interpret as a numerical value of 10.0 for extraction purposes, noting the "less than" sign in the notes. The hs-CRP value is 1.41. No patient ID, report date, report type, department, physician, or diagnosis are provided in the image description, so default/inferred values from the example are used where appropriate, but with lower confidence. The units and reference ranges are not explicitly given in the description, so common standard units and ranges for these tests are assumed.
demos.extraction_notes: The provided image description contained only test results. Patient demographics (ID, report date, type, department, physician, diagnosis) were not present and were filled with example/default values, leading to lower confidence. The CRP value is flagged as "<10" in the source; a value of 10.0 was extracted. Units and reference ranges were not specified and standard values were assumed.

signature.instructions: 检验数据提取的输入输出签名

fields.description: 检验报告图片的文字描述或OCR初步结果
患者ID/诊疗卡号（纯数字，18位身份证号）
报告类型：outpatient(门诊) 或 inpatient(住院)
hs-CRP 超敏C反应蛋白数值
提取说明，记录不确定或有疑问的地方
